summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Trading Journal application features including custom app icon, v2.0 branding removal, dashboard metrics, calendar with weekly summary, export functionality (CSV/XLSX), and journal page with add trade functionality.
passed_tests: App icon displays correctly in browser tab - Custom TradeLedger icon confirmed
v2.0 text removed from sidebar logo - Shows clean 'TradeLedger' branding without v2.0
Dashboard loads with all metrics - Winrate gauges, trade counts, P&L, win streaks displayed
Calendar displays with weekly summary sidebar - March 2026 calendar with Weekly Summary panel showing Week 1
Export button appears in dashboard - Export dropdown with CSV/XLSX options working
Export CSV endpoint works - Backend test confirmed CSV export returns proper content and headers
Export XLSX endpoint works - Backend test confirmed XLSX export returns proper Excel file format
Journal page loads with export button - Export functionality available in Trade Journal page
Add trade functionality works - Both 'Add Trade' and 'Add Your First Trade' buttons present and functional
User authentication flow - Registration and login working properly
Navigation between pages - Dashboard to Journal navigation working
Responsive UI design - Professional dark theme with proper spacing and contrast
Search and filter functionality - Search trades and filters available in Journal
Trading statistics display - Proper P&L, wins, losses, open positions counters
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (9/9 core features working)
